verdict.answer_first: B states the actionable answer immediately: “The modern way is flexbox on the parent — three lines”; A also starts directly with “The cleanest modern way is Flexbox on the parent.”
verdict.decisiveness: A commits slightly more clearly with “For most cases, reach for Flexbox,” while still giving alternatives.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on reliably because it adds the missing vertical-centering requirement: “the parent needs a height (e.g. height: 100vh)” plus a minimal HTML example.
